revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512 pixel-art sprite sheet for a game-development asset.

Hard output contract:
- One single PNG image only.
- Exact canvas size: 1024x512 px.
- Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background filling every empty pixel. No gradients.
- Grid layout is implicit only: 4 columns x 2 rows, each frame 256x256 px. Do NOT draw grid lines, borders, separators, labels, numbers, text, watermarks, UI, or guide marks.
- 8 frames total: TOP row frames 1-4 left to right, BOTTOM row frames 5-8 left to right.
- Every frame stays completely inside its own 256x256 cell with clear solid magenta margin around the character.
- Exactly one character per cell. No detached fragments, stray pixels, dust specks, seam slivers, leftover effect residue, or floating pieces anywhere.

Style and technical constraints:
- High-resolution 16-bit-plus SNES-style pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent palette, readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source.
- Bright cheerful mythical-Japan action RPG tone.
- Same character identity, facing, body proportions, scale, head size, body width, limb thickness, and pixel density in every frame.
- Re-pose the same sprite only; do not redesign, resize, restyle, or make frames vary in scale.
- Character drawn large, filling most of the 256x256 cell height while leaving small clear margins.
- Feet remain on the same ground line in every frame; feet do not move.

Reference matching:
Use the attached reference image as the exact approved identity and proportions for Mito. Match the reference character's slim-but-sturdy body width, head-to-body ratio, total height, palette, outline style, pixel density, clothing design, and accessories. This is the same character re-posed, not a new design.

Character identity:
Mito, androgynous 15-year-old wanderer, bright fantasy-Japanese traveler, NOT samurai, NOT ninja. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape with a vermilion braided-cord ornament. For this sheet Mito is facing UP in top-down 3/4 back view: show back of head, tiny low ponytail with vermilion cord, back of indigo haori; no face and no eyes visible. Outfit: white tube-sleeved top visible at sleeves and collar/back edges, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads only if naturally visible from the back. A sheathed short ritual sword hangs at the left hip in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers; it reads as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

Motion: eight-frame subtle idle breathing loop for ONE direction only, facing UP/back view. Silhouette change is very small and smooth.
- Frame 1: neutral relaxed stance, feet close together about shoulder-width apart, legs nearly vertical.
- Frame 2: slow inhale, shoulders rise 1-2 px, torso subtly lifts.
- Frame 3: inhale peak, same feet and ground line, upper body at highest point.
- Frame 4: breath held, ponytail subtly sways.
- Frame 5: exhale begins, shoulders start lowering.
- Frame 6: lowest relaxed point, body 1-2 px lower, feet still locked on same ground line.
- Frame 7: body returns toward neutral, haori back panel subtly sways.
- Frame 8: back to neutral matching frame 1 for seamless loop.

Strict proportion rule:
Use the exact same total height, head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, and slim-but-sturdy balance as the attached walking reference. Do not make Mito wider, stockier, shorter, taller, chibi-er, or more realistic. Standing relaxed and natural with feet close together, not a wide stance.

Avoid completely:
No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, or emblems. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letter emblem, text, watermark, or UI.
